历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 4859 → 6067 → 5963 → 5794 → 4805, showing a V-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing. In 2025, it rebounded to 4805, a significant increase of about 989 places compared to 2024, indicating a clear recovery in application popularity. The fluctuation range in the past two years is about 1200 places. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Physics Category were 124, 123, 132, 142, and 136 respectively, showing an overall expansion trend. In 2026, the Physics Category has 117 places plus 20 places for Medical Category, totaling 137 places, a slight increase of 1 place compared to 2025's 136 places, with an expansion rate of about 0.74%, which has a very limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 22nd in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, stable around the top 22 in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities, with strong and sustained comprehensive strength and reputation. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to the ongoing impact of the 2019 study partner incident, but the incident is now relatively old. Douyin popularity ranks 20th (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention. Historical anomalies such as the 2022 Shaanxi enrollment gap and the 2023 Journalism and Communication category ranking drop of 6414 places have a lagging effect on application psychology, but the significant rebound in 2025 rankings indicates that the negative impact has been gradually absorbed. With 19 A- and above disciplines including A+ in Mathematics, A in Chinese Language and Literature, A in Control Science and Engineering, A in Marxist Theory, and A- in Clinical Medicine, the university has strong academic strength, and popular disciplines such as Mathematics, Clinical Medicine, and Computer Science have a strong attraction for high-quality students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, and Shandong University has strong disciplinary support in these areas. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the provincial general college entrance examination is 267,900, an increase of about 15,552 from 252,348 in 2025. Physics Category, estimated at about 76% of the total in recent years, is about 203,800, an increase of about 11,700 from 192,096 in 2025, intensifying competition. In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 441 points, and the special type enrollment control line is 520 points. Shandong University is located in Jinan City, Shandong Province, not a local university in Fujian Province, so there is no local enrollment preference. Fujian candidates applying to out-of-province 985 universities need to comprehensively consider regional preferences. The geographical distance between Shandong and Fujian is moderate and within an acceptable range.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong rebound in 2025 rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in local Physics Category candidates, and the slightly negative but gradually absorbed reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 4856, with a range of 4370-5342.

Candidates with rankings between 4370-4856 are advised to mainly target Tier 2 engineering majors such as Electronic Information, Automation, and Energy and Power, while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates with rankings between 4856-5342 should primarily use Tier 3 majors as safety options and may try some Tier 2 majors. Candidates with rankings exceeding 5342 should apply cautiously. Shandong University's A+ and A- advantage disciplines are highly competitive, so candidates need to fully assess their own rankings and the popularity of majors when applying.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 山东大学在福建省医学类单独招生的历史最低录取位次呈现先降后稳的走势：2021年5039名，2022年6067名，2023年因护理学专业纳入医学类招生且计划扩至21人，位次大幅下 降至15929名；2024年计划缩减至17人，位次回升至14802名；2025年计划维持17人，位次基本持平于14801名。2026年医学类招生计划进一步扩至20人（较2025年增加3人，扩招幅 度约17.6%），扩招将降低录取门槛，使位次数字有所增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学是教育部直属的全国重点综合性大学，位列国家985工程、211工程和双一流建设高校，办学历史悠久，综合实力雄厚，在医学领域拥有齐鲁医学品牌，临床医学、口腔 医学等专业在全国享有较高声誉，对福建考生具有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是高考报考的热门方向，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。山东大学地处济南，虽非一线城市，但其医学学科积淀深厚，齐鲁医学堂等特色班型进 一步提升了医学类整体的报考热度。福建省医学类招生规模相对有限，考生对省外优质医学资源的争夺较为集中。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型与近年位次趋势，2026年山东大学在福建省医学类最低录取位次预计为16168名，较2025年有所下降（更容易进），主要受扩招3人的影响。考虑到医学专业 热度持续较高，扩招带来的位次下降幅度略小于纯模型计算值。波动区间为15925至16411名，建议考生在此区间内合理规划志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The historical minimum admission rankings for Shandong University's independent medical enrollment in Fujian Province showed a trend of first decreasing and then stabilizing: 5039th in 2021, 6067th in 2022, and in 2023, due to the inclusion of nursing in medical enrollment and the expansion of the plan to 21 students, the ranking dropped significantly to 15929th; in 2024, the plan was reduced to 17 students, and the ranking rebounded to 14802nd; in 2025, the plan remained at 17 students, and the ranking was basically flat at 14801st. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan further expanded to 20 students (an increase of 3 students compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 17.6%), which will lower the admission threshold and increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a national key comprehensive university directly under the Ministry of Education, ranked among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities. It has a long history of running schools and strong comprehensive strength. In the medical field, it has the Qilu Medical brand, and its clinical medicine, stomatology, and other majors enjoy a high reputation nationwide, exerting a sustained appeal to Fujian candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have always been a popular direction for college entrance examinations, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. Shandong University is located in Jinan, which is not a first-tier city, but its medical disciplines have deep accumulation. Special class types such as Qilu Medical Hall further enhance the overall popularity of medical enrollment. The scale of medical enrollment in Fujian Province is relatively limited, and candidates' competition for high-quality medical resources outside the province is concentrated.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and recent ranking trends, the minimum admission ranking for Shandong University's medical category in Fujian Province in 2026 is expected to be 16168th, a decrease compared to 2025 (easier to enter), mainly due to the expansion of 3 students. Considering the sustained high popularity of medical majors, the decrease in ranking caused by the expansion is slightly smaller than the pure model calculation value. The fluctuation range is 15925 to 16411, and it is recommended that candidates plan their applications reasonably within this range.
